response.justification: Candidate has extensive software engineering experience spanning 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, with solid full-stack craftsmanship credentials. However, the role is a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows only minimal, recent AI exposure (MCP code generators) without demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise. There is also no evidence of cloud platform strategy work, advising strategic customers, or operating at Principal/Director IC scope.
strengths: Broad multi-decade engineering experience across languages and domains
Demonstrated teaching, workshops, and knowledge-sharing track record
Some exposure to agentic workflows and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
Lacks cloud platform strategy and customer-advisory experience
Career titled as Senior/Staff IC, not Principal/Director-level scope

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI expertise for AI Strategy role
No cloud platform strategy or customer-facing advisory work
Long engineering tenure and broad technical breadth
